title: helianthemum canum subsp. buschii
intro: Helianthemum canum subsp. buschii, also known as the pink rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Helianthemum canum subsp. buschii include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and protect against infections, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum canum subsp. buschii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin issues, wounds, and other health problems.
